modal.title: Choose your experience
modal.lead: A platform for coaches and clients. Where would you like to go?

meta.title: StableFit — for coaches | Client, workout & nutrition platform
meta.description: StableFit for coaches: manage clients, training plans, nutrition and progress in one app. Automate admin, exercise library, chat and analytics.
meta.keywords: StableFit, fitness coach, personal trainer, client management, workout plans, progress tracking, nutrition, fitness app
meta.ogDescription: One platform for fitness coaches: clients, workouts, nutrition and progress.
meta.twitterDescription: One platform for fitness coaches: clients, workouts, nutrition and progress.

hero.description: StableFit gives fitness coaches one platform to manage clients, build training programs, track nutrition, and monitor progress.

features.description: Most coaches spend hours on administration. Spreadsheets, messengers, and manual tracking instead of working with clients. StableFit fixes this.

withoutItems.item2: Client data scattered across different apps
withoutItems.item3: Inconvenient training plans in Excel / Doc
withoutItems.item4: Progress tracking on paper or in notes

withItems.item2: All necessary client info in one place

functionality.description: StableFit combines the functionality of several apps and significantly speeds up and simplifies coaches' work.

clients.title: Client management
clients.description: Keep all client information in one place and manage it easily. Add new clients, record key data, and keep personal notes.

workouts.title: Workout library
workouts.description: Use ready-made workouts from the app, adapt them to your goals, or create your own from scratch. Build individual plans for clients and track completion.

points.item2: Edit and create your own programs

nutrition.title: Progress tracking
nutrition.description: Track clients’ results over time. Review changes in weight and measurements they enter in the app, and the reminder system will help clients update data regularly.

points.item2: Before/after photos for visual progress tracking

analytics.title: Nutrition monitoring
analytics.description: Monitor clients’ diet without extra check-ins. Review meals, analyze calories, and nutrient balance.

points.item1: Automatic calorie & macros targets based on client data and goals
points.item2: Clients can easily track meals (manual, photo, or barcode)
points.item3: AI-powered calorie and macro calculation for foods

communication.title: Easy communication
communication.description: Chat with clients directly in the app. All communication is in one place — without switching between different messengers.

points.item1: Chat with clients in one app

description.line1: Visual measurement charts, before/after comparisons, and complete change history.
description.line2: Show clients how far they've come and motivate them to continue.

measurements.title: Body measurements
measurements.description: Track changes in volume across all zones

automatisation.description: StableFit takes over administrative work so you can focus on coaching, not spreadsheets.

first.title: Efficient training workflow
first.description: Create individual programs in minutes, while the app collects feedback after workouts and helps adjust load without extra messaging.

second.title: Client motivation support
second.description:
The system helps track measurements and workout results, building clear progress visibility.
Clients see changes and stay engaged without additional reminders.

third.title: Automatic reminders for measurements and metrics

description.line1: The app reminds clients about measurements at the right time.
description.line2: Automation reduces your manual control and helps clients track progress consistently.

third.noteDescription: The system automatically notifies clients about measurements and progress checkpoints.

fourth.title: Tools that make you a pro
fourth.description: All processes run systematically. This strengthens your expert image, increases client trust, and improves work results.

testimonials.description: Built for the modern fitness professional who wants to scale their business without juggling extra tools.
testimonials.marqueeAria: Scrolling row of coach testimonial cards

first.text: Finally one app instead of Telegram, Excel, and a paper notebook. I recommend it to all my colleagues.
first.name: Vadym Prytula

second.text: Clients track progress themselves and message with questions. Their motivation went up and churn dropped by half.
second.name: Kateryna Sydorenko

third.text: I used to spend 3 hours a day on spreadsheets. Now it’s 20 minutes. I took 4 more clients and earn more.
third.name: Oleksii Melnyk

pricing.description: Start for free. Switch to a paid plan later.

description.line1: Download the coach app. Try it for free.
description.line2: Your entire fitness workflow in one place.

howToStart.description: No lengthy setup. Add your first client right now.

first.title: Sign up and add clients
first.description: Download the app, create your profile, and add clients. They’ll get an invite to register, and both apps stay in sync.

second.title: Add training programs
second.description: Use the built-in workout library or add your own. Build a personalized program for each client.

third.title: Coach and motivate
third.description: Clients log workouts and meals. Track progress together and keep them motivated.

meta.title: StableFit — for clients | Training, progress & nutrition
meta.description: StableFit for clients: personalized training, progress tracking, nutrition and your coach — in one app.
meta.keywords: StableFit, fitness client, personal training, progress, nutrition, body measurements, fitness app
meta.ogDescription: Train with structure, track progress and nutrition with your coach in StableFit.
meta.twitterDescription: Train with structure, track progress and nutrition with your coach in StableFit.

hero.description: Follow a personalized training plan from your coach, track nutrition with AI, measure body changes, and stay connected — all in one app.

functionality.description: StableFit combines the features of several apps in one place, simplifying your whole training flow and helping you reach results faster.

program.title: Training program
program.description: Get personalized plans and follow them with ease. Log exercises, track results, and stay on track toward your goals.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Talk to your coach quickly and easily. Send videos of your exercises and get comments so every session counts.

nutrition.title: Nutrition monitoring
nutrition.description: Log meals and track your diet. Your coach sees your entries and gives recommendations to maximize results.

progressTracking.title: Progress tracking
progressTracking.description: Follow changes in weight and body measurements. Clear charts help you see results and stay motivated.

communication.title: Easy communication
communication.description: Stay in touch with your coach anytime. Get important messages, tips, and support without messy threads.

points.item2: Support and tips from your coach

description.line1: Visual measurement charts, before/after comparisons, and complete change history.
description.line2: See your progress over time and stay motivated every day.

measurements.title: Body measurements
measurements.description: Track changes in volume across all zones

photos.title: Progress photos
photos.description: See real changes and stay motivated

howToStart.description: No lengthy setup. Connect to your coach and start training now.

first.title: Get an invite and sign up
first.description: Receive an invite, create your profile, and connect to your coach. Data syncs automatically so you can start right away.

second.title: Train on your plan
second.description: Train with a program built by your coach. Log exercise videos, rate difficulty, and track nutrition — your coach sees it and adjusts your plan.

third.title: Track your progress
third.description: Log workouts, measurements, and weight over time. The app reminds you when to update so you stay motivated.

testimonials.description: Built for people who want to train effectively, track progress, and get results without extra hassle.
testimonials.marqueeAria: Scrolling row of client testimonial cards

first.text: Everything in one app: workouts, measurements, nutrition. Saves time and helps me stay motivated.
first.name: Dmytro Kravets

second.text: I like logging exercises and meals — my coach sees my results right away.
second.name: Oleksandra Koval

third.text: Very convenient! Workouts and measurements are always under control, and I see progress every day.
third.name: Ihor Shevchenko

fourth.text: Thanks to StableFit I really see my progress in charts. It motivates me not to skip workouts!
fourth.name: Marko Lytvyn
